creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Am 18.10.2010 22:38 (UTC+1) schrieb Ãlvaro Castillo:
> Mmm. How I use this?
>  > stellarium __GL_SINGLE_THREADED=1

For example in a shell file:

#!/bin/sh
export __GL_SINGLE_THREADED=1
/usr/local/bin/stellarium

> On 17 October 2010 16:13, Henry Hu <henry.hu.sh
> <http://henry.hu.sh>@gmail.com <http://gmail.com>> wrote:
>
>     Hello, please try to run with __GL_SINGLE_THREADED=1
>     Here is freebsd 8.0-STABLE i386, and it also crashes...
>     By the way, are you using the NVidia binary driver?
>
>     --
>     Cheers,
>     Henry
